text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Isn't this great? Isn't this fun?! We get to spend
the whooole day celebrating!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh... Thank you, Urara. But today, well...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I was so tired this morning, I could barely get
myself out of bed. And the weather says it's going
to rain soon...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I bring nothing but misfortune, even on my
birthday. So... you should keep your distance
from me...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Whooa! That's amazing—fantastic! You're so
lucky!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Don't you see? Your bed hugged you reeeal snug
and tight.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
And later, all the drops of rain are coming down
to wish you a happy birthday! ♪

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Which meeeans... I gotta do my part too—to
make sure you have the best birthday ever!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Yeah... yeah! Thank you... Thanks so much, Urara!
